## ProductionTools.IUseFillingSlotManagementOptions.onSelectProduction property

Callback when selecting from existing options (production selection, not recipe edit). If provided, selectFilling() calls this instead of onUpdateDraft.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onSelectProduction?: (slotId: SlotId, fillingId: string) => void;
```
